task_description: Create an Electron desktop application that replicates the HDR video analysis functionality of HDRAnalyzer_V8.py. The app should allow users to select an HDR video file, analyze it using bundled FFmpeg, and display a 3-panel chart (brightness, gamut ratio, APL histogram). The chart image can be saved via a Save As button.

verification.summary: Cannot run npm install in INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode. All 6 JS files pass node --check syntax validation. package.json is valid JSON. Code review confirmed correct port of PQ EOTF, gamut classification, and chart generation logic from Python source. Review findings (main-thread blocking, orphaned FFmpeg, gamut confidence mask, buffer allocation, listener leak) were all addressed in a follow-up commit.
